name: checkmate
description: Draft and QA RFP compliance matrices in Spare's voice, with deterministic per-row precedent lookup against Spare's entire past-RFP corpus. Bundled pure-stdlib MCP server (checkmate-precedents) indexes every answered row from the Spare General Google Drive folder and returns TF-IDF-matched precedents for each new requirement, so every answer is sourced in code rather than prose. Forbids no-bid and scope-judgment outputs. Corpus refresh is a Cowork-native skill that uses the Drive connector, no terminal or Google Cloud setup required.
